title: Sero's MC
description: Explore the worlds, equip yourself to defy your enemies, discover new structures, and travel through space and time.
body:
Sero's Minecraft is the successor to Sero's Better Minecraft, but Sero's Minecraft offers the essential mods needed to fulfill its role as the superior successor.

Exploring the world and its numerous structures plays a major role. Acquiring the best armor and weapons is also challenging due to the newly introduced bosses and dimensions.

Small details such as player animations and features that positively impact gameplay are also included.

There are 4 new dimensions, 2 upgraded dimensions, new world generation, structures, weapons/armor, and the ability to travel through space.
